items.title: MS NOW Reveals New Show Names Ahead of Debuts
items.desc: The new weekday programs debut Monday, June 15.

items.title: Ahead of Paramount Mega-Merger, WBD Bets on Agentic Ads
items.desc: At its upfront presentation to advertisers, the entertainment behemoth showcased plans to enhance targeting and interactivity across media environments with AI

items.title: Jeep Wrangler Marks 85 Years With Muscle From Captain America
items.desc: The campaign coincides with both brands' 85th anniversaries and America's 250th birthday

items.title: TikTok Builds for the AI Future, Welcoming Third-Party Agents for Ads
items.desc: TikTok is investing more aggressively in AI ads infrastructure—while entrenching its walled garden effect.

items.title: With Breeze Airways Partnership, Archer Roose Turns to Travel to Build Its Brand
items.desc: Distribution deal with Breeze Airways marks a push into travel as a key marketing channel for the Elizabeth Banks-owned canned wine brand

items.title: Disney Makes Super Bowl and Live Events the MVP of Its Upfront Pitch
items.desc: Disney had more than 100 celebrities, but live events and the Big Game were the true stars of its upfront.

items.title: YouTube’s Brandcast Puts Creator Partnerships Front and Center
items.desc: Google's ad sales chief Sean Downey talks direct-to-creator deals, channel slates, and why 'the future of brand is trust, not social.'

items.title: Why Some Brands Chose Stagecoach Over Coachella This Year
items.desc: Brands like T-Mobile and American Eagle tapped into the buzzy country music festival to reach a growing niche
